title: Health/Disability Related Support Groups * Amputations - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Health/Disability Related Support Groups * Amputations 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Amputations Autism Spectrum Disorder Blindness Deafness Hard of Hearing Parkinson's Disease AIDS/HIV Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF HANGER CLINIC AMPUTEE SUPPORT GROUP AND RESOURCE CENTER AMPOWER AMPUTEE PEER SUPPORT GROUP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a peer-to-peer support program with mentorship, education, and community resources. Consists of a nationwide network of trained peer mentors who have successfully recovered and rehabilitated following amputation and want to share their personal experiences. Website Austin, TX 78758 Eligibility: Individuals with limb loss or limb difference and their family members and friends Hours: No standard hours (877) 442-6437 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
